name: Memphis Vision Care Pvt. Ltd.
tagline: Sterile prefilled syringe manufacturing for critical care segments.
description: Memphis Vision Care is focused on sterile injectable and ophthalmic products supplied in prefilled syringe formats for healthcare and business partners.
mission: To deliver reliable sterile dosage forms that support safer handling, accurate dosing, and consistent quality for healthcare professionals.
vision: To become a trusted partner for prefilled syringe manufacturing across ophthalmic, critical care, orthopaedic, and gynaecology segments.
